rules: Headings strictly avoid Inter, Roboto, Open Sans.
Never center align paragraphs; use left-align for high readability.
Overlines/labels must be Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-primary.

general: Use py-20 to py-32 for major section vertical padding.
px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 for responsive horizontal container padding.
Always use optical alignment for icons and text.

surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat solid background bg-white, 1px border border-slate-200, rounded-xl. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-[0_12px_32px_rgba(10,102,194,0.1)] transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary-dark transition-colors shadow-lg shadow-primary/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors

shadcn_overrides: Tabs: use pill-shaped triggers, bg-accent-blue for active state, text-primary.
Cards: Go cardless or use sharp/subtle rounded-xl with strong borders. No default Vercel look.

animations.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
animations.hover: Interactive elements must shift color and slightly lift (-translate-y-1) or scale (1.02).
animations.entrance: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0) for lists and grids using Framer Motion.
animations.counters: Use Framer Motion to animate number counters from 0 to target.

hero_background.description: High-end corporate innovation hub architectural render with blue accents. Best used in Hero.

network_background.description: Abstract blue network connectivity for global scale sections or CTA backgrounds.

modern_office.description: Modern corporate building, great for the 'About' or 'Collaborate' context.

laboratory_team.description: Scientists working on computers, suitable for 'Ecosystem' or 'Insights' sections.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react for UI icons. Where partner logos fail to load or look poor, augment the partner section using lucide icons (e.g. Building2, Landmark, Shield) to simulate partner companies.

Home.layout: Hero section with background overlay (bg-black/30). Left-aligned H1. Framer motion entry. Stats row showing 17+ IPs, 228+ Partnerships, 4L+ Students using animated counters.

About.layout: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) for Vision/Mission and Core Capabilities.

Investor.layout: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3). Dynamic IP Cards displaying value, market size, revenue potential. Hover effects mandatory.

Collaborate.layout: Tabbed Interface. Left column tabs, right column content (Academia, Industry, Startups, Government).

Ecosystem.layout: Control Room layout for Metrics dashboard (using Recharts). Marquee component below for partner logos carousel.

Insights_and_Careers.layout: Listings with filters, clean typography, minimalist borders.

Contact.layout: Two-column layout: Form on the left, Contact Info / Map on the right.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and setup required packages: `npm install framer-motion react-fast-marquee recharts lucide-react @fontsource/outfit @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans` or equivalent if using yarn.
Add font imports to your global CSS or root component.
Use Shadcn UI components for Tabs, Cards, Inputs, and Forms, heavily customizing them to avoid the default look.
Create a smooth scrolling experience using a library like lenis if feasible, or pure CSS scroll-behavior: smooth.
Every interactive element MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.
